hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; bash "$ROOT/scripts/commit-review-gate.sh" "$CMD"

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *'Info.plist' ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *'GoogleService-Info.plist' ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *'.env' ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *'Secrets' ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *'keys.plist' ]]; then echo '🔒 SENSITIVE CONFIG FILE: This file may contain secrets (API keys, Firebase config, app IDs, tokens). Verify you are intentionally editing this and not committing sensitive values.'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$ROOT" ]] && [[ "$FILE" == *.swift ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *DerivedData* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *SourcePackages* ]]; then cd "$ROOT" && OUTPUT=$(swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml --reporter xcode --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1); TOTAL=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "$OUTPUT" | head -50; if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 50 ]; then echo "... and $((TOTAL - 50)) more violations"; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *Tests/*.swift ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *UITests* ]]; then echo '✅ Test file modified. Remember: Tests must run on a connected physical device (not simulator). Use: xcodebuild test -project meApp.xcodeproj -scheme meAppTests -destination "id={DEVICE_ID}"'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.swift ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *DerivedData* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *SourcePackages* ]]; then STAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d); CF="/tmp/meapp_edits_${STAMP}.txt"; N=$(cat "$CF" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); N=$((N + 1)); echo "$N" > "$CF"; if [ "$N" -eq 5 ] || { [ "$N" -gt 5 ] && [ "$((N % 10))" -eq 0 ]; }; then echo "[post-change-guard] ${N} Swift files edited this session. Run /post-change-guard to auto-fix lint, accessibility, and concurrency issues before self-review."; fi; fi
